name: active-flow show-top command prints only the top-of-stack entry without modifying the file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"flow":"a"}\n{"flow":"b"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-show-top.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -q '"flow":"b"' out.txt && [ "$(wc -l < .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack)" = "2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
